description: Draft → Submitted → Approved workflow exported as IEEE 1849-2016 XES XML. Asserts the output parses as well-formed XML via quick_xml::Reader, contains exactly one <trace>, and emits one <event> per provenance record, each carrying concept:name and time:timestamp. Also asserts §6.3's custom lifecycle attribute choice: wos:lifecycleState is present and standard lifecycle:transition is absent (WOS lifecycle state names are NOT mapped to the fixed XES lifecycle vocabulary). Kernel and event sequence are defined once in tests/export_conformance.rs (shared_workflow_kernel / shared_workflow_events).
